metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code plugins for full-stack engineering workflows

plugins.name: shared
plugins.description: Shared conventions, coding style, and meta-skills

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: System design, tradeoff analysis, and architecture decision records

plugins.name: backend-dev
plugins.description: API design, database schemas, and error handling patterns

plugins.name: test-builder
plugins.description: Unit, integration, and end-to-end test generation

plugins.name: data-engineer
plugins.description: Pipeline design, schema review, and SQL optimization

plugins.name: frontend-dev
plugins.description: Component building, styling review, and accessibility checks for React/Next.js

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Edge case discovery, bug review, and regression checking

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design review — layout + responsive behavior, design systems, usability heuristics, and user flows

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Dockerfiles, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure review

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Code audits, dependency checks, and IAM reviews

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: User stories, task breakdowns, and PRD writing

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Tiered autonomy + build-test-fix, staged dev, and prod deploy loops for hands-off AI workflows

plugins.name: feature-bank
plugins.description: Source-of-truth feature specs with preflight/postflight gates that stop agent drift

plugins.name: web-tester
plugins.description: Live web-app verification — drive real browser flows via Playwright MCP, assert console and network health
